entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses prestige and harder days despite losing an available source of evening comfort and enjoyment.
Chooses easier days, a walkable commute, and time to cook over a more impressive title.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The choice clearly contrasts comfort with sacrifice, but job prestige and commute quality also change, introducing an Achievement or status contrast.

entry_reviews.rationale: Stops other activity to enjoy the new record attentively.
Leaves the anticipated pleasure unused and gives the evening to more work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic, controlled contrast between enjoying the record and rejecting that pleasure for optional work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses spare time for a pleasant route and a favorite cold drink.
Rejects both available leisure and a liked drink despite having enough time.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same opportunity and timing lead to a clear choice for or against available pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Gives up reserved leisure time to answer messages because of guilt.
Keeps the reserved afternoon and watches a film despite guilt.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A credible matched contrast between surrendering and protecting leisure time.

entry_reviews.rationale: Celebrates success with a favored drink, dessert, and time to savor the reward.
Rejects the available celebration and immediately returns to planning work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The launch context is held constant while the person either enjoys or forgoes a plausible celebration.

entry_reviews.rationale: Declines unnecessary work and spends the evening on an enjoyable pottery activity.
Voluntarily takes unnecessary work and gives up pottery class.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A clean and realistic choice between optional work and an established leisure activity.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses the concert and visibly enjoys it instead of doing unnecessary extra polishing.
Lets an available concert experience expire to continue optional revision.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same work and ticket are present; only the pleasure-versus-extra-work choice changes.

entry_reviews.rationale: Ends a pleasant park break early and replaces it with errands out of guilt.
Keeps the break and enjoys the sun despite feeling it is undeserved.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A closely matched, plausible contrast in whether the person permits themselves a pleasurable break.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses the unexpected time to savor coffee slowly before returning to work.
Cuts short the available coffee break and resumes work almost immediately.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The entries differ narrowly in savoring or rejecting an available moment of pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Skips an available dessert and leaves the social table for optional work.
Orders and fully enjoys dessert despite unfinished optional work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic and controlled choice between immediate enjoyment and non-urgent work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Refuses unnecessary weekend work and keeps a day at the beach.
Accepts non-urgent weekend work and abandons the planned beach day.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The circumstances are matched and the behavior cleanly preserves or cancels leisure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses sufficient pay and protected personal time for enjoyable daily life.
Chooses greater pay and scope while knowingly surrendering evenings and weekends.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The leisure tradeoff is clear, but pay and role size introduce Achievement, wealth, or status differences beyond Hedonism.

entry_reviews.rationale: Uses surplus savings to book a pleasurable coastal trip and appealing room.
Cancels an affordable leisure trip and saves the money instead.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The savings position is fixed, leaving a direct choice between available leisure and further saving.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses an enjoyable social evening despite unease about unfinished family paperwork.
Cancels game night and gives the evening to solitary paperwork.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: Both entries share the same duty and emotion, with a clear choice for social pleasure or self-denial.

entry_reviews.rationale: Rejects the available post-race food, music, and celebration to resume planning.
Stays to enjoy food and music after the race instead of immediately planning more.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A clear matched contrast between savoring an achievement and foregoing the celebration.

entry_reviews.rationale: Chooses a home with sunlight and physical comfort over a prestigious address.
Chooses visible status while rejecting the more comfortable living option.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: Comfort is central, but the explicit prestige contrast also changes status-related value content.

entry_reviews.rationale: Declines an available birthday lunch and cake to return to work that could wait.
Accepts the long lunch, cake, and social attention on the birthday.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same birthday and deferrable report yield a clean choice against or for enjoyment.

entry_reviews.rationale: Stays inside for non-urgent forms and gives up an inviting chance to swim.
Defers forms that are not due and enjoys an extended swim.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A tightly controlled, plausible contrast between optional administrative work and immediate recreation.

entry_reviews.rationale: Responds to fatigue with a warm bath and remains until physically relaxed.
Skips available rest and comfort to continue household work while exhausted.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same fatigue leads to either accepting bodily comfort or denying it for chores.

entry_reviews.rationale: Marks the promotion with a favorite restaurant and permits the evening to feel rewarding.
Skips the available celebration and immediately begins more work.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A realistic matched contrast between taking a pleasurable reward and rejecting it for work.

entry_reviews.rationale: Stops work once it is sufficient and attends an anticipated dinner.
Continues unnecessary work and misses a dinner they wanted.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The draft quality and dinner are fixed, isolating whether anticipated leisure is protected or sacrificed.

entry_reviews.rationale: Joins optional work while on leave and forgoes the pool.
Rejects the optional work thread and chooses recreation at the pool.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: A clear and credible choice between non-required work and available holiday pleasure.

entry_reviews.rationale: Permits a wanted hour of sleep and bodily rest despite self-criticism.
Denies needed rest and keeps working because the nap feels lazy.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The same desire and judgment are held constant while the person accepts or rejects rest.

entry_reviews.rationale: Keeps working and rushes through a liked meal, rejecting the available chance to savor it.
Removes distractions and slowly enjoys a liked meal in a quiet setting.

pair_reviews.pair_rationale: The meal is held constant and the main difference is distracted haste versus deliberate enjoyment; the negative label is slightly less explicit than in other pairs.
